title: Lustre I/O saturation — climate_sim stalled by checkpoint_dump
summary: Job 999001 (checkpoint_dump) is writing at 800 MB/s per node (3.2 GB/s total) to the shared Lustre filesystem, saturating the OST bandwidth. Job 999002 (climate_sim) on nodes 5–8 has stalled — CPU util <5%, read throughput near zero. climate_sim is performing at <5% normal rate.

timeline.event: Alert: climate_sim CPU util drops to <5%

notes: Consider cancelling checkpoint_dump or applying lctl I/O throttle.
